tex:
Write down the mathematical name for

(a) an angle which is less than 90°,

(b) a polygon with 5 sides,

(c) a quadrilateral with exactly one pair of parallel sides.

hexagon \quad\quad perpendicular \quad\quad isosceles

regular \quad\quad congruent
Put a ring around the word that describes two polygons that are the same shape and size.
Write $\dfrac{60}{105}$ in its simplest form.

Calculate.

\[
\sqrt{\frac{1}{0.01}} - 8^2
\]

Hua cycles from her home to the library.

The travel graph shows this journey.

\begin{InsertScreenShot}

\end{InsertScreenShot}

(a) At what time does she start her journey?

(b) (i)  Find her distance from home when she stops for a rest.

 How long does she stop for a rest?

(c) Hua stays at the library for 10 minutes.

She then cycles home at a constant speed of 24 km/h.

Complete the travel graph.

A field, $ABC$, is in the shape of a triangle.

$AC = 500$m and $BC = 650$m.

**Using a ruler and compasses only**, complete the scale drawing of the field $ABC$.

Leave in your construction arcs.

Use a scale of 1cm to represent 100m.

The side $AB$ has been drawn for you.

\begin{InsertScreenShot}

\end{InsertScreenShot}

Alan and Beth share \$1190 in the ratio Alan : Beth = 5 : 2.

Work out how much Alan receives.

\$

Work out.

(a) $\begin{pmatrix} 2 \\ -3 \end{pmatrix} + \begin{pmatrix} 5 \\ -1 \end{pmatrix}$

$\begin{pmatrix} \phantom{00} \\ \phantom{00} \end{pmatrix}$ 

(b) $4\begin{pmatrix} 2 \\ -5 \end{pmatrix}$

$\begin{pmatrix} \phantom{00} \\ \phantom{00} \end{pmatrix}$

Rangan buys 3.6kg of potatoes and 2.8kg of leeks.

The total cost is \$13.72.

Leeks cost \$2.65 per kilogram.

Find the cost of 1kg of potatoes.

\$

\[
T = \frac{49.2 - 9.59}{4.085 \times 2.35}
\]

By writing each number correct to 1 significant figure, work out an estimate for $T$.

You must show all your working.

You must show all your working and give your answer as a mixed number in its simplest form.

Trina invests \$16000 at a rate of 5\% per year compound interest.

Work out the value of her investment at the end of 4 years.

\$

Aisha records the distance she runs and her average speed.

The results are shown in the scatter diagram.

\begin{InsertScreenShot}

\end{InsertScreenShot}

(a) The table shows the results of four more runs.

\begin{tabular}{|l|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
Distance (km) & 4.2 & 5.7 & 7.1 & 8.8 \\
\hline
Average speed (km/h) & 13.4 & 11.8 & 9.8 & 8.3 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
On the scatter diagram, plot these points.

(b) What type of correlation is shown in the scatter diagram?

(c) On the scatter diagram, draw a line of best fit.

(d) Use your line of best fit to estimate her average speed when she runs a distance of 6km.
texHtml:
Aisha records the distance she runs and her average speed. The results are shown in the scatter diagram. (a) The table shows the results of four more runs.
Distance (km)4.25.77.18.8
Average speed (km/h)13.411.89.88.3
On the scatter diagram, plot these points. (b) What type of correlation is shown in the scatter diagram? (c) On the scatter diagram, draw a line of best fit. (d) Use your line of best fit to estimate her average speed when she runs a distance of 6km.
